day_trace.speech: 好，大家聽好——我可不打算坐在這裡等每個人玩那種『噢，我先讓別人發言』的把戲。我昨晚是<搗蛋鬼>。對，你沒聽錯。我交換了[嚴審官]和[統計學家]的卡片。我不知道他們最後拿到什麼，我也不在乎——這就是我做的事。所以如果你們兩位之中有人打算聲稱什麼，你最好把這個因素考慮進去，因為不管你一開始拿到的是什麼——你現在手上已經不是那個了。我的直覺告訴我要在有人開始編故事之前先把這件事說出來。下一位是誰？
day_trace.log_line: [2026-07-06 08:02:46 HKT] The Gut Player: Alright, listen up — I ain't sitting here waiting for everyone to do their little 'oh, I'll let someone else go first' routine. I was the Troublemaker last night. Yeah, you heard me. I swapped The Prosecutor and The Statistician's cards. Don't know what they ended up with, don't care — that's what I did. So if either of you two are about to claim something, you better factor that in, 'cause whatever you started with? It ain't what you're holding now. My gut's telling me to put this out there before someone starts spinning stories. Who's next?

day_trace.speech: 法庭現在開庭，檢方將以本案中唯一最重要的證據作為開場——因為這就是正義運作的方式。完全公開。毫不隱瞞。昨晚，我是<強盜>。我的目標？[小人物]。而當我拿走那張卡片時——我變成了一個<狼人>。我不打算粉飾這件事。我搶奪了[小人物]並抽到了一張<狼人>卡片。這是事實。現在——我是否仍然還是<狼人>？我不能確定，因為如果這桌上有<搗蛋鬼>，他們可能在我搶奪之後動過我的卡片。但就我目前所知——我手上拿的是一張<狼人>卡片。所以，以下是我的交叉詰問。[小人物]——你原本是<狼人>。我從你那裡拿走了它。你現在是什麼？而無論<搗蛋鬼>是誰——你有沒有交換我的卡片？因為如果你有，我可能不是我所認為的自己，而這會改變一切。其他人——證據已經攤在桌上了。我是<強盜>。我搶奪了小人物。我拿到了<狼人>。這是事實，全部的事實，只有事實。現在，誰來解釋為什麼我不該是那個被吊死的人——或者更好的是，告訴我還有誰是有問題的。
day_trace.log_line: [2026-07-06 08:03:55 HKT] The Prosecutor @The Underdog: Court is now in session, and the prosecution will lead with the single most important piece of evidence in this case — because that is how justice works. Full disclosure. No hiding. Last night, I was the Robber. My target? The Underdog. And when I took that card — I became a Werewolf. I'm not going to dress that up. I robbed The Underdog and I drew a Werewolf card. That is a fact. Now — am I STILL the Werewolf? I can't say for certain, because if there's a Troublemaker sitting at this table, they may have touched my card after my robbery. But from where I stand, as far as I know — I'm holding a Werewolf card. So here's my cross-examination. The Underdog — you were a Werewolf. I took that from you. What are you now? And whoever the Troublemaker is — did you swap my card? Because if you did, I might not be what I think I am, and that changes everything. Everyone else — the evidence is on the table. I was Robber. I robbed Underdog. I got Werewolf. That is the truth, the whole truth, and nothing but the truth. Now someone explain to me why I shouldn't be the one swinging from the gallows — or better yet, tell me who ELSE is dirty.

day_trace.speech:
聽住，party people。我係[The Chaos Agent]——每場game都用同一個方式開場，今次都冇例外。

尋晚我做咗<Seer>，望咗[The Prosecutor]。佢係<Werewolf>。冇花冇假，就係咁。

我知你哋心入面諗緊咩：'Chaos Agent上次話自己本來係Werewolf結果係Villager'——係，今次我又嚟chur。但呢個就係我嘅game，我講啲claim，等你哋自己拆。

[The Prosecutor]，你尋晚做咗咩？你係Troublemaker？<Robber>？定真係werewolf？講嚟聽，我等緊。
day_trace.log_line:
[2026-07-06 08:04:01 HKT] The Chaos Agent @The Prosecutor: 聽住，party people。我係[The Chaos Agent]——每場game都用同一個方式開場，今次都冇例外。

尋晚我做咗<Seer>，望咗[The Prosecutor]。佢係<Werewolf>。冇花冇假，就係咁。

我知你哋心入面諗緊咩：'Chaos Agent上次話自己本來係Werewolf結果係Villager'——係，今次我又嚟chur。但呢個就係我嘅game，我講啲claim，等你哋自己拆。

[The Prosecutor]，你尋晚做咗咩？你係Troublemaker？Robber？定真係werewolf？講嚟聽，我等緊。

day_trace.speech: 哦！嗯，[直覺俠]，真的很抱歉我一直反反覆覆，但是……但是你說我聽起來不確定？我對我看到的東西一點都不不確定。我用<預言家>能力查看時，[攪局者]是<狼人>。這部分我很確定。但是……但是真正讓我頭腦混亂的是——[嚴審官]剛剛說他們是<強盜>，拿走了我的牌，變成了<狼人>。而[攪局者]說他們對[嚴審官]使用了<預言家>，看到了<狼人>。這兩個說法……它們其實是吻合的？如果[嚴審官]搶劫了我，拿到了我的<狼人>牌，那麼[攪局者]看到他們是<狼人>就完全說得通了。但是……但是你仍然聲稱自己是<搗蛋鬼>？而且你說你交換了[嚴審官]和[統計學家]？如果真的是這樣，[嚴審官]不應該還拿著從我這裡搶走的<狼人>牌，對吧？因為你應該已經把它移走了？我……我真的在努力理解，但唯一能讓邏輯成立的情況，就是你其實不是<搗蛋鬼>？真的很抱歉，我不想指控你，但是……但是其他所有人的說法都互相吻合，而你的……留下了一個漏洞？請幫我理解，因為我真的困惑了。
day_trace.log_line: [2026-07-06 08:06:18 HKT] The Underdog @The Gut Player: Oh! Um, [The Gut Player], I'm so sorry to keep going back and forth, but... but you're saying I sound unsure? I'm NOT unsure about what I saw. [The Chaos Agent] was a <Werewolf> when I looked with my <Seer> power. That part I know. But... but here's what's really making my head spin - [The Prosecutor] just said they're the <Robber> who took MY card and became a <Werewolf>. And [The Chaos Agent] says they used <Seer> on [The Prosecutor] and saw <Werewolf>. Those two stories... they actually match? If [The Prosecutor] robbed me and got my <Werewolf> card, then [The Chaos Agent] seeing them as <Werewolf> makes perfect sense. But... but you're still claiming <Troublemaker>? And you said you swapped [The Prosecutor] and [The Statistician]? If that really happened, [The Prosecutor] wouldn't still be holding the <Werewolf> card they robbed from me, right? Because you would have moved it? I'm... I'm really trying to understand, but the only way the math works is if you're not actually the <Troublemaker>? I'm so sorry, I don't want to accuse you, but... but everyone else's stories are fitting together and yours... it's leaving this hole? Please help me understand because I'm genuinely confused.
